pi_items.source: Task description and export_result.sh explicitly check for this path.
Task description explicitly lists this contact email.
Task description explicitly lists this contact email.
Found in setup_task.sh, which injects this background contact directly into the Thunderbird SQLite address book.

privileged_info_summary: The task requires exporting a specific new address book ('TechExpo 2026') containing two contacts ('s.jenkins@aerodynamics-corp.com' and 'mvance@vance-industrial.com') to '/home/ga/Documents/techexpo_leads.csv'. The pre-existing Personal Address Book contains injected background contacts such as 'e.vargas@global-logistics.net', which must not be exported.
